title: My priorities - Michelle Scrogham MP
text_excerpt: My priorities - Michelle Scrogham MP Skip to main content Home About My priorities News Get in touch More Menu My priorities I’m about community and the success of Furness. We’ve been let down and left behind, with our communities becoming some of the poorest in the country. We need strength and a voice that will fight for Furness. ​My priorities: Michelle at FGH with petition signatures Protect our NHS and put it back on its feet again after years of neglect. That includes making sure that Furness General Hospital is made a priority for investment and that services are improved. Barrow Rising adding greenery to town centre Regenerate our High Streets. I am passionate about the role that our town High Streets can play in building community. So many people rely on our High Streets and I want to see them thriving again across Barrow and Furness. Michelle with Defence Committee Support our defence industry, brave armed-forces personnel and veterans. Through my position on the Defence Committee, as Chair of the AUKUS All Party Parliamentary Group, and as officer in the All-Party Defence Group I will stand up for our country’s important defence industry, our armed forces and veterans in Parliament. Michelle at Spirit Energy / MNZ Peak Cluster Unlock potential for green jobs in Furness. Our unique geography and manufacturing expertise means we can become a national leader in the green-energy transition which will bring jobs and investment. I will push forward plans for new hydrogen power innovation, a floating solar park, upgrades to the offshore wind industry, and a carbon storage facility making use of the depleted gas fields in Morecambe Bay. Michelle on a local bus Get buses, roads, and rail working for you . Our towns have some of the worst transport links in the country. The A590 and A595 are not fit for purpose and our train and bus infrastructure is a joke – all this is holding us back. For decades, major road upgrades and rail projects have been promised, but Tory governments in Westminster have failed to deliver. I will unlock better infrastructure for our towns.
